metadata.description: PostHog skills for Claude Code — analytics, feature flags, error tracking, and more

plugins.name: impersonation-toolkit
plugins.description: Run safer impersonation-scoped audits against a customer's PostHog project via Claude Code + the PostHog MCP plugin. Read-only by default; prompts before any mutative MCP call.

plugins.name: posthog-debugger
plugins.description: Debug and inspect PostHog implementations on any website

plugins.name: posthog-survey-creator
plugins.description: Create and configure surveys in PostHog through guided conversation

plugins.name: posthog-inbound-lead
plugins.description: Evaluate and respond to inbound PostHog sales leads from Salesforce

plugins.name: posthog-pls-big-fish
plugins.description: Research, qualify, and suggest outreach for PostHog big fish product-led leads
